title: hieracium nigritum subsp. pseudeximium
intro: Hieracium nigritum subsp. pseudeximium is a lesser-known species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus, characterized by its yellow flowers and feathery foliage. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which may aid in wound healing and reducing swelling. The health benefits of Hieracium nigritum subsp. pseudeximium include its potential to support digestive health, reduce fever, and act as an antiseptic agent. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
